name: Serve HTML
func:
msg.headers={'Content-Type':'text/html'}; msg.payload=` ABB GoFa-12

ABB GoFa-12

State—
Mode—
RAPID—
Speed—%
X—
Y—
Z—
J1
—
J2
—
J3
—
J4
—
J5
—
J6
—
Connecting...

Cartesian Jog — base frame translate / tool frame rotate

Joint Jog (degrees per axis)

Absolute Joint Move (MOVEJ)

Ping

Save Current Pose

Go To / Delete Saved Point

Sequence Runner

    Export / Import Points

    Import (paste JSON array):

    Motors

    RAPID Execution

    Home & Stop

    Gripper

    Speed Override

    Path Zone

    Lead-Through (Gravity Compensation)

    ASI Status LED

    List Signals

    Digital Input — Read

    Analog Input — Read

    Digital Output — Write

    Analog Output — Write

    Read RAPID Variable

    Write RAPID Variable (requires PC Interface option + edit mastership)

    System Info

    Event Log

    File Read (controller filesystem)

    Upload .mod File (local path on Node-RED host)

    `; return msg;

name: Route move
